name: pr-review
description: Reviews a GitHub pull request and produces a structured Markdown report covering code quality, security, type safety, and test coverage.

trigger.description: Review a GitHub pull request. Usage: /review-pr <PR-number | GitHub URL | owner/repo/number>

input.description: The pull request to review — either a number, a full GitHub URL, or owner/repo/number.

output.description: Structured PR review with summary, code issues, security review, and test coverage.

notes: Requires `gh` CLI to be authenticated. Ensure GITHUB_TOKEN is set when running in CI.
